title: Cobblemon x Create
description: A fresh combination of Create and Cobblemon addons to fuel your tinkering, Pokémon addictions all in one place!
body:
### Cobblemon x Create meshes two of the best minecraft mods, and their most relevant addons, together for maximum tinkering and Cobblemon fun! 

**Enjoy Create Mod & 2 added dimensions paired with a more feature-full Cobblemon experience, including TMs, Breeding, Trainers, Battle Gimmicks, and more!**

_This pack aims to add further integration between these two giant mods as time goes on._

## Cobblemon Addons Included:
- Mega Showdown (Dynamax, Megas, Terastallization, Z-Moves, Form Changes, and support for Legendaries!)
- Cobbreeding (Breeding through the pasture block!)
- SimpleTMS (Craftable TM/TRs and Pokémon drop TMs (1%) and TRs (10%)
- Whiteout (YOU Faint when your team faints)
- Cobblemon Capture XP (XP on capturing a Pokémon)
- Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn (Pokémon will fight you, and your Pokémon will fight back!)
- Cobblemon Integrations (Gives Jade integration for viewing wild Pokémon stats/types)
- Cobblemon Create Industries (Pokéball Assembly with Create Mod!)
- Cobblemon Parting Gifts (Transferred Pokémon have a chance to give EV feathers, XP, and items from their drop pool)
- Cobblemon Unchained (Gives support for chaining Pokémon for increased IVs, Hidden Ability Chance, and Shiny Rate)
- More Cobblemon Tweaks (Assorted QoL improvements including better PC controls)
- Radical Cobblemon Trainers (Adds level cap system, trainers, and gym progression to the pack)
- Cobblemon Trainers Double Battles - All RCT Trainers will challenge you to a doubles battle, if the trainer has more than 1 Pokémon.
- CobbleFurnies - A furniture sidemod
- Cobblemon PokéNav - Assists you in hunting for specific Pokémon

_There are currently no riding mods or legendary mods in the pack. If you want to add them they will slot in perfectly!_

## Create Mod Addons Included:
- Create Crafts & Additions (Power Integration into Create)
- Create Encased (More Casing Options)
- Create Stuff N' Things (More Armor, Tools, and QoL items (like a jetpack!))
- Create: Bells & Whistles (Some more Block type variants)
- Create: Copycats+ (More Copycat block options!)
- Create: Dreams & Desires (Added building blocks and other minor additions)
- Create: Enchantment Industry (Revamps enchanting within Create machines)
- Create: Let the Journey Begins (Adds Create Structures)
- Create: Oxidized (Copper oxidation with Create Mod)
- Create: Stam1o Tweaks (Adds some crafting recipes for previously non-farmables)

## Some Other Bigger & Smaller Mods:
- The Aether!
- Deeper Darker (Deep Dark Dimension)
- Storage Drawers
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Sophisticated Storage
- Exposure
- Xaeros Minimap & Worldmap
- Shaders
- Tectonic World Generation

Get a sense of the pack through the a series by myself and KC (who maintains the Battlecraft SMP modpack)! <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7GE3B9r7HLU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
